title: Zelda Gerudo Valley on Mario Paint Composer
description:
Milestones:
100,000 views October 13 2008
200,000 views May 29 2009 (My birthday :D)
300,000 views April 07 2010
500,000 views July 22 2013

My Twitter: https://twitter.com/_AxelRude
I stream at: https://mixer.com/axelrod777

I decided that for reaching 100 subscribers I would re-record my 2 most popular videos using the more superior recoring software I own now and edit them so there isn't a gaping err... gap.

I did not alter the song from the original so it's still the same song, but with better quality, no lag, correct sync, more loops, and no gaping hole between clips.

So here is the new and improved Gerudo Valley! Enjoy!

Software used:
Music: Mario Paint Composer - http://www.unfungames.com/mariopaint/

Notation: MidiNotate Player - http://www.notation.com/MidiNotatePlayer.htm

Video: Camstudio 2.0 - http://camstudio.org/

Editing: Windows Movie Maker

All free, legal, and unlimited.
